rationale: The citing paper references Melumad, Inman, and Pham (2019) only in broad literature-review statements about prior work on consumer emotional expression in social media and as part of a grouped definition citation. It does not use that paper's smartphone mechanism, design, measures, or findings to develop its own hypotheses about brand status, nor does it test or extend that specific line of argument. The citation functions as contextual background rather than a paper-specific building block.
